items.briefing:
Australian organisations are facing a busy threat landscape today. The INC ransomware group is actively targeting Australian businesses, so staff should be alert to suspicious emails or system behaviour. Separately, the Australian Cyber Security Centre (ACSC) is warning that login credentials for Fortinet firewalls and VPN gateways have been exposed — if your organisation uses these devices, IT teams should be notified immediately to check for unauthorised access. Cloudflare has also flagged rising cyberattacks against civil society groups, including Australian ones.

**Practical tip:** If you receive unexpected login prompts or password reset requests today, don't click — contact your IT team directly to verify.

featured.title: ACSC warns of reported credential exposure affecting Fortinet firewalls and VPN gateways
featured.quote: ACSC warns of widespread credential exposure affecting critical Fortinet firewalls used nationwide.
